label: Replace hediff comp
description: Replaces this hediff with another when removed or at a given severity.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

replaceWith.label: Replace with
replaceWith.description: Hediff to apply when this one is removed.

replaceAtSeverity.label: Replace at severity
replaceAtSeverity.description: Severity at which to replace. -1 means on any removal.
